overview: Syrma SGS Portal is a company document management portal with AI summarization. It allows teams to manage client and vendor customer records, upload documents linked to specific customers, and search for documents by customer name from the Dashboard.
features: Left sidebar navigation with Dashboard, Client, Vendor, and Upload panels
Client and Vendor panels for saving customer names with a Save button
Upload panel with step-by-step flow: choose Client/Vendor, select customer name, upload document
AI-powered document summarization for uploaded files
Dashboard search by customer name shows all linked documents
Login and user registration with persistent sessions
Per-panel customer name lists with associated documents
